payload.query: Rowland and Carp claim that the attitudinal and rational choice models do not adequately conceptualize trial judges. Explain these models and other models of judicial behavior. What model is most appropriate for federal trial courts, appeals courts, and the Supreme Court? What model offers the least explanatory value for each level?

articles.title: My Hope for Nick Reiner
